Unverified claim of major geopolitical deal (Hormuz Strait toll freeze); would be material-if-true for oil/macro, but single-source (Trump Truth Social) requires credibility verification before treating as confirmed catalyst.

prediction_record.reasoning: Fails Step 1: Trump's declaration about Hormuz Strait tolls is posture -- the US does not control the Strait of Hormuz (located in Iranian/Omani territorial waters) and cannot unilaterally impose or waive tolls there; this is characteristic leverage-seeking rhetoric, not an executed policy. The implied ceasefire context is interesting but not confirmed as a new completed fact by this post alone, and the toll declaration itself is not an executable action.

articles.title: There will be NO TOLLS in the  Hormuz Strait for 60 days during the Cease Fire Period, and there will be NO TOLLS after the 60 day period has expired, unless they are imposed by and for the United States of America, should the deal not be completed, for services rendered as the Guardian Angel to the countries of the Middle East for purposes of both past, present, and future reimbursement of costs. Thank you for your attention to this matter!!! President DJT
articles.reasoning: Posture, not fact: Trump claiming toll authority over a strait the US does not control is leverage rhetoric, not an executed policy -- fails Step 1.
